name: PreviewSceneQuality
summary: Quality levels when creating preview images

enum_values.name: RealtimeQuick
enum_values.summary: Obsolete. Very fast preview. Typically using the internal OpenGL preview generator.

enum_values.name: RefineFirstPass
enum_values.summary: Obsolete. Low quality rendering for quick preview.

enum_values.name: RefineSecondPass
enum_values.summary: Obsolete. Medium quality rendering for intermediate preview.

enum_values.name: RefineThirdPass
enum_values.summary: Obsolete. Full quality rendering (quality comes from user settings)

enum_values.name: Low
enum_values.summary: Low quality rendering for quick preview.

enum_values.name: Medium
enum_values.summary: Medium quality rendering for intermediate preview.

enum_values.name: IntermediateProgressive
enum_values.summary: Intermediate update, always considered better quality than the previous IntermediateProgressive, but not as high as Full.

enum_values.name: Full
enum_values.summary: Full quality rendering (quality comes from user settings).
